message:
fix(layout): Fix dashboard-layout breaking main content display

The dashboard-layout grid was conflicting with the existing .two-column
grid, causing the main content (phage list + detail view) to be squashed
into a narrow column.

Changes:
- .dashboard-layout now uses `display: contents` by default, making it
  transparent to the layout so the existing two-column grid works normally
- Grid layout only activates with --with-sidebar modifier
- Simplified grid to `1fr auto` (main content + sidebar) instead of
  trying to control the internal list/detail columns
- The .panel.two-column handles its own internal grid layout as before

This fixes the issue where the DNA sequence view and 3D viewer were not
displaying properly when a phage was selected.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
